title: User Requirements — Verbatim Source Of Truth
summary: Captures every binding user requirement near-verbatim across sessions; the canonical source the design and code must converge to, winning all conflicts.
scope: forbidden concepts (concentric spheres, graph analytics, Llama)
notes: Manifest declared TYPE=ADR (authoritative). Heuristic content reads as a requirements source-of-truth (PRD-like) but manifest override applied. Not a single Accepted-status ADR, so locked=false despite being the highest-priority source per its own preamble; precedence=0 honored from manifest.
